Chapter 3: Immunization Strategies for Healthcare Practices and Providers Adam Bjork, PhD and Valerie Morelli, BA 
Mar. 28, 2024 
At a glance 
This chapter explores strategies health care providers can implement within their own practices. It covers system-level interventions such as quality improvement programs, as well as practice-level actions directed toward patients and provider staff. Note: The 14th edition of the “Pink Book” was published August 2021. Vaccine-specific recommendations may be outdated.
